---
title: "Notebooks"
---

Interactive walkthroughs for the memo chain, DICIE pipeline, classical
baselines, and the sample document corpus. Pages below are rendered from the
repository `notebooks/` directory (via symlinks) with execution disabled at
site build time.

For a live Jupyter kernel:

```bash
pip install -e ".[notebooks]"
jupyter notebook notebooks/
```

## Portal

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Pipeline walkthrough](pipeline_walkthrough.ipynb) | Memo-chain analysis: markdown → classify → extract → vision → summarize |
| [DICIE pipeline walkthrough](docie_pipeline_walkthrough.ipynb) | Paper Fig. 1 path for medical bills / salvage claims |
| [Random Forest text + handwriting](random_forest_text_handwriting_classification.ipynb) | TF-IDF + Random Forest baseline with OCR/handwriting noise |
| [Sample corpus walkthrough](sample_document_corpus_walkthrough.ipynb) | Seed and query the SQLite medical / salvage store |
| [Sample corpus SQL integrations](sample_corpus_sql_integrations.ipynb) | SQL-oriented views and integrations over the sample corpus |
| [Sample corpus train/test pipeline](sample_corpus_train_test_pipeline.ipynb) | Export corpus data into train/eval preparation paths |

## Regenerating sample-corpus notebooks

```bash
python scripts/build_sample_corpus_notebooks.py
```

See also [Sample Document Corpus](../sample_document_corpus.md) and
[How-to: launch this site](../how-to/launch-quarto-site.qmd).
